recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Longlegs
recommendations.overview: FBI Agent Lee Harker is a gifted new recruit assigned to the unsolved case of an elusive serial killer. As the case takes complex turns, unearthing evidence of the occult, Harker discovers a personal connection to the merciless killer and must race a

recommendations.title: The Stendhal Syndrome
recommendations.overview: A young policewoman slowly goes insane while tracking down an elusive serial rapist/killer through Italy when she herself becomes a victim of the brutal man's obsession.

recommendations.title: Woman on the Run
recommendations.overview: Frank Johnson, a sole witness to a gangland murder, goes into hiding and is trailed by Police Inspector Ferris, on the theory that Frank is trying to escape from possible retaliation. Frank's wife, Eleanor, suspects he is actually running away from t

recommendations.title: Lady in White
recommendations.overview: Locked in a school closet during Halloween 1962, young Frank witnesses the ghost of a young girl and the man who murdered her years ago. Shortly afterward he finds himself stalked by the killer and is soon drawn to an old house where a mysterious Lad

recommendations.title: The Diary of Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: The story of Anne Frank, the Jewish girl who went into hiding with her family in Amsterdam and became a victim of the Holocaust.

recommendations.title: D.O.A.
recommendations.overview: Frank Bigelow is about to die, and he knows it. The accountant has been poisoned and has only 24 hours before the lethal concoction kills him. Determined to find out who his murderer is, Frank, with the help of his assistant and girlfriend, Paula, be

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Got Away
recommendations.overview: A female serial killer who killed four young girls is sent away to prison, but a fifth victim escaped with her life. Twenty years later, the killer escapes and begins hunting for the one who got away.

recommendations.title: Suspect Zero
recommendations.overview: A killer is on the loose, and an FBI agent sifts through clues and learns that the bloodthirsty felon's victims of choice are other serial killers.
